Class NodeTable

java.lang.Object
org.ants.jndd.nodetable.NodeTable
public class NodeTable extends Object

  • Field Details

    • nodeField

      public int[] nodeField
      Field index for each node (index 0/1 reserved for terminals). Public for direct array access in hot paths (NDD operations).

    • nodeEdgeBlock

      public int[] nodeEdgeBlock
      Stable edge-block id for each node.

    • nodeEdgeCount

      public int[] nodeEdgeCount
      Number of edges for each node.

    • refCount

      public int[] refCount
      Reference count of each node.

    • edgeTarget

      public int[] edgeTarget
      Target node id for each edge.

    • edgeLabel

      public int[] edgeLabel
      BDD handle for each edge label.

  • Constructor Details

    • NodeTable

      public NodeTable(long nddTableSize, int bddTableSize, int bddCacheSize)
      Construct the node table.
      Parameters:
      nddTableSize - The max size of the ndd node table.
      bddTableSize - The BDD node table size.
      bddCacheSize - The BDD cache size.

  • Method Details

    • getBddEngine

      public BDD getBddEngine()
      Get the internal BDD engine.
      Returns:
      The internal BDD engine.

    • declareField

      public void declareField()
      Declare a new field and add a unique table for it.

    • getCurrentSize

      public long getCurrentSize()
      Get the number of stored nodes (excluding freed slots).
      Returns:
      The current stored node count.

    • getTotalCreated

      public long getTotalCreated()
      Get the total number of NDD nodes ever created.
      Returns:
      Total number of nodes created (including those later garbage collected).

    • getField

      public int getField(int nodeId)
      Get the field index of a node.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.
      Returns:
      The field index, or Integer.MAX_VALUE for terminal nodes.

    • getEdgeStart

      public int getEdgeStart(int nodeId)
      Get the start index of edges for a node.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.
      Returns:
      The start index in edge arrays.

    • getEdgeCount

      public int getEdgeCount(int nodeId)
      Get the number of edges of a node.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.
      Returns:
      The edge count.

    • getEdgeTarget

      public int getEdgeTarget(int edgeIndex)
      Get the target node id of an edge.
      Parameters:
      edgeIndex - The edge index in edge arrays.
      Returns:
      The target node id.

    • getEdgeLabel

      public int getEdgeLabel(int edgeIndex)
      Get the BDD handle of an edge label.
      Parameters:
      edgeIndex - The edge index in edge arrays.
      Returns:
      The BDD label handle.

    • getEdgeTarget

      public int getEdgeTarget(int nodeId, int offset)

    • getEdgeLabel

      public int getEdgeLabel(int nodeId, int offset)

    • mk

      public int mk(int field, int[] targets, int[] labels)
      Create or reuse an NDD node with given edges.
      Parameters:
      field - The field index.
      targets - Array of target node ids.
      labels - Array of BDD label handles (same length as targets).
      Returns:
      The node id (new or reused).

    • mk

      public int mk(int field, int[] targets, int[] labels, int offset, int length)
      Create or reuse an NDD node with a slice of edges. Edges live in shared append-only arrays; each node stores only a stable block id plus the edge count so the hot path can stay object-free.
      Parameters:
      field - The field index.
      targets - Array of target node ids.
      labels - Array of BDD label handles.
      offset - Start index in targets/labels.
      length - Number of edges.
      Returns:
      The node id (new or reused).

    • gc

      public void gc()
      Garbage collection: remove nodes with zero reference count and compact edges.

    • compactEdgesIfNeeded

      public void compactEdgesIfNeeded()
      Compact edges if fragmentation ratio exceeds threshold. Safe to call only when no recursive NDD operation is in progress. Throttled to check only every COMPACT_CHECK_INTERVAL calls.

    • compactEdgesAtSafePoint

      public void compactEdgesAtSafePoint()
      Force compaction at a caller-provided safe point.

    • ref

      public int ref(int nodeId)
      Increment reference count of a node (protect from gc).
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.
      Returns:
      The same node id.

    • fixNDDNodeRefCount

      public void fixNDDNodeRefCount(int nodeId)
      Mark a node as permanently referenced (e.g. variable nodes), so it is never collected.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.

    • deref

      public void deref(int nodeId)
      Decrement reference count of a node (allow gc when zero).
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.
